name: Sparky
desc: Our protagonist! Need I say more?
quote: What's this? Cake? Eat! What's this? Donut? Eat! What's this? More food? Eat! Hey, you took the last pancake! I'M GOING TO KILL YOU!
about:
Sparky is a cheerful girl who once stood for something. She hides her trauma behind bright smiles and is almost uncapable of taking anything seriously. Usually she looks happy to other people, but she can turn aggressive at the drop of a pin. She is currently the bodyguard of [Animus](/characters/animus/) and her weapon of choice is an old civilian Colt 1911.

Thanks to [Ribbon](/characters/ribbon/) and [her mom](/characters/amber/), she is an excellent chef.

She's sort of a control freak, especially to the ones she love and fear losing. She also used to harbor naive but beautiful dreams about truth and justice, despite constantly handing out very questionable judgements she isn't supposed to give just because she has power to do so, and always viewing her own understanding as the objective truth.

She came into contact with [Starcorp](/world/bauhinia/starcorp/) when her dad died and her mom married [Peacock](/characters/peacock/). Her awakening came upon discovering just a tiny part of Starcorp's horrid crimes ([Pearl](/stories/new-year-2032/)), and [failing to defy them](/stories/pearls-journey-home-sylvandia/).

After being informed that her mom died, her hatred towards Starcorp and Peacock reached a peak. She investigated, but came to a desperately hopeful conclusion: that Peacock was trying to disassemble Starcorp from the insides.

She stopped hating him, and instead vowed to take the same path he did. She feigned loyalty towards Starcorp, and accepted the adults' plan for her to become Animus's bodyguard, the closest protector of the future chairman. In that position, she could surely take down Starcorp from the inside.

But as she reaped the fruit of being at the top of society, she couldn't help but feel that the loyalty may be real after all.

She died in the realization that she grew into exactly the person her younger self used to hate. Not ready to let go, she spat out [Meng Po](/world/meng-po/)'s soup behind her back and traveled to her [next life](/characters/peacock/) with all her memories intact…
trivia:
- She twiddles her whisker-like hair when lying.
- Tofu is her favorite food. All kinds of them.
- She loves spicy food.
- She loves food.
- If she had a lusus, it would be a jackalope.
- Her motifs include jackalopes, bunnies, cats, and dancing lions.
    - This has nothing to do with the character [Jackalope](/characters/jackalope/).
- Songs:
    - [你哪个省的？](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1GDtvzVE8F/) (Parody of [裏表ラバーズ](https://youtu.be/b_cuMcDWwsI?si=s3Ka2daE4kp6abNe))
    - [Gasoline - Halsey](https://youtu.be/zRHNi3QfFlE?si=VSfeSbC35OSh20fy)
- If she were ever to have a *dedicated* theme song, it would be titled *Sugar High*.
note:
- The strand of hair on her left cheek is longer, touching on her chin, while the strand on her right cheek is shorter.
- The highlights on her hair goes down, up, and then down.
- Her pupils point towards the middle! Unless she's looking at somewhere in particular.
- Any interaction with Nightsun (romantic or otherwise) *must* be drawn in her adult design; so are bodyguarding activities (with or without Animus)!
desczh:
> 这是啥，蛋糕？我吃！这啥，甜甜圈？我吃！这啥，能吃？我吃！嘿，你把最后一张饼吃了？去死吧！！

闪闪是个很开心的小宝宝呢！但是也很容易被激怒。是鲲鹏的保镖。很会做饭和烘焙。

她对自己所爱的人很有控制欲，生怕失去了他们。她也曾经对真相和正义有着天真的期待，虽然她自己经常爱给别人下达不该下达的审判（对，就是千百万那一茬事）。她在死前意识到自己已经成为了她小时候最讨厌的那种人。

name: Amber
desc: Hardworking girl who would be cheerful if she had the time to smile.
about: Amber has no idea how she came across Peacock; it was like magic. (Hint: Peacock was looking for her.) Now she quit her job as a janitor and spent all her time on her daughters. However, after being turned by the shady organization fighting against Starcorp and Bauhinia (that I haven't named yet), she used her proximity to Peacock to find a lot of evidence for Starcorp's numerous crimes. Despite Peacock's pleas, she was assassinated by Starcorp.

name: Peacock
desc: Creepy old boy who knows everything and more.
about:
Peacock is [Hyrax](/characters/hyrax/)'s old friend and personal attorney.

~~He is also [Sparky](/characters/sparky/)'s reincarnation.~~

He is practical and rational, and often appears quite emotionless. Around his kids, he constantly looks like he's about to kill himself.

His job, as he described it, is "professional butt-wiper." He covers up Starcorp's illegal activities, either by framing them as legal, or making sure no one has enough evidence to implicate them. Big things don't pop up that often though, so most of his time is spent union-busting and shutting people up about general employee mistreatment.

He had spent a good chunk of his time looking for his mother in the past life — [Amber](/characters/amber/), even when he knew he would lose her once again.
trivia: - If he had a lusus, it would be a peacock.
note: The highlight on his hair goes up, down, and then up.
desczh:
蹄兔的私人擦屁股专家，美名其曰律师。天天摆着一副“我想自杀”的脸，尤其是在自己小孩附近——尤其是在闪闪附近。只有在琥珀附近似乎才能真正开心起来。

### 历史

孔雀出生在紫荆国东部的一个农村。他的右眼有个像伤疤似的胎记。从小他就展现出了超常的智慧，很多东西懂得比高年级的哥哥姐姐都多，更是了解很多法律法规。他的爸妈也十分得意自己家出了个天才儿子。

孔雀十二岁时，他最喜欢的小狗汪汪被孔雀爸妈在除夕宰了吃了，而且自己也在不知情的情况下吃了几口。为此，孔雀一哭二闹三逃学，把自己锁房里不肯出门，带着自己的大力士超能力，谁来了都没辙。村里的人都在伤仲永，整得孔雀爸妈很没面子，也索性不管了，活还得干啊，每天吃完饭，把病在床的爷爷喂饱了，原本给汪汪的剩饭就放孔雀门口，反正饿不死。

一天，孔雀爸妈回家，发现孔雀做了满满一桌的菜，以示歉意。这孩子一下就懂事了呢！吃着吃着，他们感觉不对劲。这肉……

孔雀？这肉你上哪儿整的？

孔雀，你爷爷呢？

这下惯不下去了。但爸妈哪放得下这么一个宝贝天才儿子呀！到处打听，听说城里有个训练营，专治不乖的孩子，学费好大几，砸锅卖铁地也是把孔雀送进去了。在训练营里，孔雀结识了蹄兔。这人自称是繁星集团家族的长子，按照家族传统被送到这里来磨炼意志，方可继承家业。听说了孔雀很懂法后，他说，要是孔雀长大后能成为律师，他就把他招聘过来做自己的私人法律顾问。

也是在这里，孔雀终于完整地想起来了自己作为闪闪的前世。原来自己的知识等等都是闪闪吐了孟婆汤后继承下来的。而且他也确实会去到繁星，做蹄兔的律师。

回来后，爸妈发现孔雀真的变了个人，乖啦，孝顺啦！这钱花得不冤！孔雀开始认真学习。他顺利地考取了律师资格证，找到了曾经的蹄兔。

后来他爸妈天天嚷着抱孙子，他一生气把奇幻领养了回来。

然后他就找到了琥珀。

前世的妈妈。前世她没有爱够的妈妈。

那就这辈子再多爱一次吧。

琥珀当时带着闪闪，豺狼死掉的赔偿金花得差不多了。嫁给了孔雀后就不工作了，生了柳儿，在家里照顾奇幻、闪闪和柳儿（虽然奇幻已经很大了）。

后面，奇幻说记得自己有个弟弟，但很早就被领养走了，想让孔雀找到他。最后孔雀确实找到了，把铁心接了回来。

孔雀死后，第二次到奈何桥上。孟婆问他，你准备好了吗？

准备好啥？

告别。

故事总算有了终结。

name: Willow
about: Ah, the cute little spoiled kid. Her weapon of choice is a pair of scissors she would twirl around and throw at people.

name: Ribbon
about: Ribbon is a bakery owner in Coastline. Her weapon of choice is a frying pan. Everybody likes her, especially Sparky and her friends.

name: Qibli
quote: This pearl was not from an oyster. It was from a human. No, not man-made. From a human, the way ivory was from elephants.
about:
Qibli is a girl. Her wand of choice is a plastic star-shaped toy wand. She is a *huge* pussy. Overthinks everything, tries to chicken out of more, always worrying about how things could go wrong.

She's really nerdy. She likes spy thrillers and computer programming, though she sucks at it. She also loves reading and drawing comics.

She was born with magic. But her magic was so weak that it didn't even show until she was three years old. Her parents took her to the hospital, the doctors called the Arch-Magician [Nebula](/characters/nebula/), and she told her parents to buy her a wand and taught her to store her magic in it. She hadn't left the wand's side since then.

She spent most of her childhood around [Sky](/characters/sky/).

She attended [Coastline Middle School](/world/bauhinia/cms/) because her mom worked there. Which is where she met [Sparky](/characters/sparky/).

~~She's also supposed to represent me by the way.~~
trivia:
- She always talks in past tense. If you see her talking in present tense, then I probably made a mistake.
- Her family has a cat named Sandstorm.
- Lightning is taken from one of my first OCs ever, a Warrior cat named Lightningtail. (That was before I read Dawn of the Clans.)
- If she were ever to have a theme song, it would be titled *Hotpot for One（单人火锅）*.
- If she had a lusus, it would be a husky.
- Her motifs include cats and dogs.
- The symbol on the hat is [Aquittarius](http://hs.hiveswap.com/ezodiac/truesign.php?TS=Aquittarius) from the Hiveswap Extended Zodiac.

name: Sky
about:
Sky is an adventurous boy who cannot stop moving.

He likes cardistry and is nearly always twiddling a desk of cards in his right hand.

His weapon of choice is a set of four cards made of steel with sharp edges, which act like throwing stars. The cards are aces of each suit. After joining the MSS, he had also taken a liking to his baton.

He is really into stuff he considers cool, like photography, military, and science. He ended up looking nerdy.

After an encounter with the MSS in middle school, he was given a chance to attend high school at [Ministry Affiliate](/world/bauhinia/ministry-affiliate/). He graduated with excellent performance and was recruited into the ranks of the MSS with Goose as his mentor. He then went on to create a legend during the Fantoni Invasion War, which earned him a rocket promotion from Half-Noob straight to Old Grouch (skipping Normal Rank). Afterwards, he spent the rest of his days teaching at Ministry Affiliate. During recess, he loved showing off his cardistry skills to his students, and then adamantly refusing to teach them, quoting, "I just spent 40 minutes teaching you! *Now* you like my teaching?"
trivia:
- He is left-handed.
- He has six countryball dolls on his desk, one for each country, that squeak when you squish them.
- The students in Ministry Affiliate started spreading a rumor that he used to work at a casino.
note: - Left horn points down, right horn points up.

name: Firecrackers
desc: Big kind boy with no manners.
about:
Firecrackers does not have a weapon of choice because he chooses peace over violence.

Physical violence, that is. Firecrackers likes cursing even more than Sparky does. It's better when he's directly speaking to you; he would only stick a lot of middle fingers at you. But when he's texting, you can expect a curse every sentence. He also likes telling jokes. When he's not telling jokes, he's reading jokes from joke books.

His dad runs a little grocery store, and he often manned it for them during his spare time. His mom was missing, his dad won't tell him where she is, and his sister says she's in jail.

He was drafted into the army during the Fantoni invasion despite his muteness, because he didn't have a disability certificate given out by a hospital that can prove it. He was killed during battle by one of the spells Qibli sold to Fanton.
trivia:
- Firecrackers is mute, if you haven't noticed.
- If he had a lusus, it would be a golden retriever.
desczh:
爆竹比闪闪更爱骂脏话。要是他在你面前的话还好，顶多竖竖中指；但在发短信时，基本每句话都得带个脏字。他也很喜欢讲笑话。不在讲笑话时就在看笑话。

他爸爸开了一家杂货铺，爆竹有时会帮他看店。他不知道自己妈妈去哪儿了，爸爸不肯告诉他，姐姐则说她去坐牢了。

范顿侵略战爆发后，他被征兵入伍，尽管自己是哑巴，因为他开不出残疾证明。他被一个奇轹卖给范顿军队的魔法咒语杀死了。

name: Myriad
about:
Myriad has a mutation that gives her a pair of fairy wings. She's really insecure about it, worried that people would only try to use her for that, so she hides them tucked inside her backpack which she never takes off.

She's also a kleptomaniac. She holds herself back from stealing actually valuable stuff, but she loves pocketing pens and rulers and stuff. She also stole a lot of her parents' stuff, like a lipstick tube from her mom, which in turn got stolen by the imitator.
trivia: - 满族。

name: Alaska
about:
They're nearly always cheerful and happy-go-lucky looking. Don't be fooled by that. They will backstab you (or even front-stab you) every time they get the chance.

They're the imitation thief who stole Myriad's lipstick and Sky's poker cards in the pickpocket case. But Sparky framed Myriad for everything instead.
trivia: - When at school, they wear the non-gendered jacket uniform with no shirt underneath. Two jackets if it's cold.

name: Tomato
desc: The guy who can solve all your problems but doesn't want to.
quote: I can fix anything… From a leaking pipe… to a shattered bone… to a broken heart…
about: Tomato talks really slowly. Their weapon of choice is a wrench.

name: Potato
about: Potato talks really quickly.

name: Guillotine
about: Guillotine is from Atlasia, but her parents came over to Bauhinia to work for Starcorp, so she's attending Coastline Middle School in the meantime.

name: Tephra
desc: The boss of everything at once, but nothing in particular.
quote: Sit down everyone. The investigation is underway.
about:
Quite insufferable and bossy. His weapon of choice is a Walther P38.

Went to police academy in Flower City, and ended up being a cop there.
trivia: - If he had a lusus, it would be a desert fox.

name: Jerboa
quote: Who ordered me to do it? It's — OW — I did it on my own! Nobody ordered me!!
about:
Jerboa grew up in the Project Boomerang labs with his family. Later, his parents disappeared from the facility, and he was sent to Coastline and adopted by [Jam](/characters/jam/).

He had taken up many professions, such as being a bartender, chemist, and undertaker. He really wants to find out what happened to his family. His most prized possession is a family photo of his parents, his sister, and him.
trivia: - If he had a lusus, it would be a jerboa.
desczh:
跳鼠在回旋镖计划的实验基地里长大。后来，他的父母和姐姐都消失了，自己也被送回大陆，被果酱领养。

他基本上记不得实验基地里的事，一直想知道自己的家人到底怎么了。他的同学火山灰告诉他，只要跳鼠一直做他的小跟班他就会帮他找到真相；他还真信了，做了他一个初中的小跟班。

后来，火山灰真的帮他联系到了糖霜。

name: Jam
desc: Teacher of all the subjects because I'm too lazy to make more.
about: Jam is [Sparky](/characters/sparky/)'s teacher at [Coastline Middle School](/world/bauhinia/cms/) and [Jerboa](/characters/jerboa/)'s adoptive father.

name: Trinket
about:
Trinket was born with quite strong magic. Her wand of choice is a jade bracelet. She started going to [Magic Academy](/world/bauhinia/magic-academy/) as soon as she was 10. There, she met and befriended [Qibli](/characters/qibli/).

But then, Qibli murdered [Nebula](/characters/nebula/). Trinket was freshly 18, and crowned Arch-Magician shortly after attending Nebula's funeral.

Her current task is teaching in the Magic Academy. She dedicated her spare time to seeking revenge from Qibli.

To do so, she hired private detective [Melody](/characters/melody/), who found his good cop buddy [Tephra](/characters/tephra/).

In the end, they caught Qibli (see [Qibli on the Run](/stories/qibli-on-the-run/)).

Trinket's behavior shown in her dedication to catching Qibli satisfied Kismet. He decided to reveal his true self to her, fully accepting her into his closest circle.
trivia: - She's albino, in case it's not obvious.
desczh:
玲珑的魔法很强。一满十岁，她就被送去了魔法学院。在那里她遇见了奇轹。

但后来奇轹谋杀了星云。玲珑那时才十八岁，参加完星云的葬礼后就飞去伟思德维亚被冠上了顶级魔法师的称号。

她的日常工作就是在魔法学院教书。剩下的时间她都在找奇轹复仇。

为此她雇佣了私家侦探音韵，而音韵又找到了他的好朋友火山灰。

最后，他们抓到了奇轹！

玲珑在抓奇轹以及后续的审问等等中的表现让天意很满意，于是他决定告诉玲珑关于自己的真相，让她终于成为了自己身边的人。

name: Nebula
about:
Nebula is the Arch-Magician crowned by the [ISA](/world/westavia/isa/), and the teacher of the [Magic Academy](/world/bauhinia/magic-academy/) appointed by the Bauhinian government.

Her wand of choice is a teaching stick named the Physical Sword, though she did not actually store her magic in it. She just pretends she does and it's not like anyone else would know. She also has myopia, but uses magic to see clearly.

She got strong through *A Guide to Magic*, and cast an irreversible additional charm on it that made her know the book's position at all times, though it came to bite her in the ass: when [Qibli](/characters/qibli/) found out about the book and decided to keep it, she murdered Nebula so she wouldn't know her location all the time.
trivia:
- As of now, she's the only character who wears high heels.
- Song: [Killer Queen - Mad Tsai](https://youtu.be/0HHwoZhpenk?si=ZVCq7Nczwz-TL1z-)

name: Fantasy
about: The big sister away at [college](/world/bauhinia/ufc/) and hardly heard from, except when she comes back for holidays. Died under mysterious circumstances, though this time the mystery may *finally* be too dangerous for Sparky to poke her nose in.

name: Ironheart
desc: The cocky sibling we all hate.
about:
Ironheart was bought from his previous adoptive parents because Fantasy asked Peacock to find him. He was then enrolled in Fancy Private School and set on a path to become Starcorp's new CEO.

Peacock and Hyrax arranged for him to marry [Beauty](/characters/beauty/).
trivia: - If he had a lusus, it would be an elephant.

name: Nightsun
about:
Nightsun grew up in the hellscape that is Atlasia. His weapon of choice is a seedling sword (苗刀). He later became a freelance spy, gathering intelligence and selling it to whoever bid the highest — and multiple people, if the risk was low.

Later, he got himself into Stuff, and had to flee to Bauhinia. He murdered a Bauhinian citizen named Nightsun who kind of looked like him, and assumed his identity. With that, he began working at Starcorp, hoping to gather intel on the company.

One day, be bumped into [Sparky](/characters/sparky/), the chairman's bodyguard, and she immediately went smitten over him. They got married and she made Nightsun quit his job. Now that Nightsun is right in the inner circles of the Starcorp family… his clients *will* be well-fed.
trivia: - Strawberry is his favorite flavor of lolipop.
note: - The highlight on his hair goes up, down, and then up.

name: Bramble
desc: Silly little boy who writes his feelings all over his face.
about: Fantasy's son, now adopted by Sparky and Nightsun.

name: Goose
quote: If you feel unloved, we can send you to the Ministry of Love, where you'll be loved *so much* you don't *ever* need to be loved again!
about:
Check out her [PMV](https://youtu.be/v4ats5O0mio)!

Goose is *just* like other girls. She likes everything other girls like. She does everything other girls do. She listens to whatever music is most popular at the moment. She watches whatever show is most popular at the moment. She 's 29 but still lives with her parents. If they died she would bury herself with them.

Goose is just happy to spend her life on the bandwagon.

---

Goose is an officer at the [Ministry of State Security](/world/bauhinia/mss/). She likes juggling her baton and giving vague threats about sending people to a possible Ministry of Love. She has a knack of trying her best at everything she puts her mind to do. She never fails to take business personally.

She dedicated most of her life to fighting against an equal opponent, [Jackalope](/characters/jackalope/) of the [MIC](/world/moreland/intelligence-corps/). Later, as her paranoia grew, she launched a purge of the Ministry, getting rid of her enemies and allies alike. Goose then became a symbol of fear, paranoia, and the overreaching power of the MSS.

On her deathbed, perhaps Goose would look back on her childhood years and wonder, *what made me this way?*
trivia:
- She gives off a goofy villain vibe.
- She loves juggling her baton, kicking it from one foot to the other, catching it on her chin, spinning it on her fingertips, and throwing it at random colleagues (usually Pumpkin).
- If she were ever to have a theme song, it would be titled *Goosebumps（鹅皮疙瘩）*.
- If she had a lusus, it would be a goose.
- Song: [苍蝇（The Fly） - ilem](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1p5411879s)
- During her visits to Ministry Affiliate, the students started spreading a rumor that if you're touched by her, you will be cursed to die on your 18th birthday, and the only antidote is stabbing yourself with the school's rooftop weather vane in the place she touched you until you faint from the bleeding.
note:
- You can change the uniform design, but
    - Keep it a dark color
    - Have the Bauhinian pink somewhere on it
    - Make sure they're wearing gloves

name: Pumpkin
about: Pumpkin is a goofy guy who loves slurping boba tea and hates filling out forms.
trivia:
- He gives off a goofy dumbass vibe.
- 维吾尔族。
note:
- Any interactions with Goose or other MSS people should be drawn in his uniform.
    - You can change the uniform design, but
        - Keep it a dark color
        - Have the Bauhinian pink somewhere on it
        - Make sure they're wearing gloves
- Any interactions with Candlelight or other villagers should be drawn in his blue clothes.
    - His stubby horn will make a bulge in his hat. Would be charmed if it's drawn, but you don't have to!
desczh:
### 历史

南瓜的爷爷奶奶从伟斯德维亚逃到了紫荆国来。他的爸爸妈妈一直不让他过多地接触伟斯德维亚文化，想让他更融入紫荆社会，但这搞得他在两个地方都格格不入。

家长严格的要求只教会了他去迎合讨好。结果在高考的那一天，紧绷的线终于断了。他交了空卷，第一个出考场，把记者推开，在街上漫无目的地走着，不想去下一场考试，没钱吃饭，更不敢回家。

走着走着，就走进了一个征兵所。

于是南瓜参了军，又在军队里被招进了国安部，做太平的徒弟。与他一起进去的还有海军的白鹅，师父是镇纸。

但不出一会儿，太平就要求南瓜协助他窃取紫荆国机密。南瓜照做了，但这条新绳子越来越紧绷，直到一天他实在受不了了，决定向镇纸自首。太平窃听到了，就在南瓜回家的路上把他谋杀了。

但是南瓜没死。他爬了起来，找到办法逃到伟思德维亚，化名“卷毛”想回到自己爷爷奶奶的村子里。

在从第一区到第二十九区的火车上，他遇见了烛光，发现他们俩是去往同一个地方的。于是他们就一起去啦。

name: Halcyon
desc: The only one in the team who actually works.
about:
Halcyon is a [Morelandian](/world/moreland/) spy working for the [MSS](/world/bauhinia/mss/).

An avid opportunist, a hopeless romantic, and a dirty traitor. But did he betray Bauhinia, or did Bauhinia betray *him*?

After being given Moose nationality, he was classified as an extrovert.
trivia:
- During his (not numerous) visits to Ministry Affiliate, the students started spreading a rumor that he is secretly a fox disguised as a human, and ever since then he had annoying kids following him, trying to catch him in fox form.
- He hates raising children but loves having them. Which is probably why he likes Moreland so much.
note:
- You can change the uniform design, but
    - Keep it a dark color
    - Have the Bauhinian pink somewhere on it
    - Make sure they're wearing gloves

name: Paperweight
desc: Grouchy old guy who hates fun.
about:
Paperweight is a senior officer at the [Ministry of State Security](/world/bauhinia/mss/).

He usually maintains a very calm and authoritative composure to others, especially the people he deals with at work — spies, moles, and pesky annoying kids. But under his composure, he is a frothing pit of pure rage. He is constantly angry at everything at once but nothing in particular, saddled by the weight of his own guilt and his colleague's suspicion of treason. To people he knows, like [his](/characters/goose/) [subordinates](/characters/pumpkin/), he yells at them all the time. Also he's homophobic as fuck.

He misses the old times when he could actually run without his knees screaming murder and shoot a gun without his hands shaking. This is why he hates young people — because he's kind of jealous.

He wishes someone could believe him. His colleagues ostracized him and his wife left him because of this, but he really wanted [Whiteout](/characters/whiteout/) back.

---

Everyone in this stupid world is an idiot. Including me.

Pumpkin should go fuck his own perverted gay ass! I'd drown him inside a milk tea pool! (Pumpkin: that's a nice way to die actually) Goose can *never* understand human speech. Oh, have the report on my desk by 3, I'd say. She'd flip through the window at 3 in the *fucking morning* and make security piss their pants. Halcyon, would you mind your *own* fucking business? I'm just old; I'm not fucking stupid! You don't have to remind me about that meeting over and over and over — I can keep time better than you could, so shut up!

Sigh. Finally some peace and quiet. Med time. Let me take a blood pressure too… Still a little high. Alright.

Sometimes I wonder if I could just give up and let myself die. What's the point of living like this, isolated by my colleagues, and shunned by my family? Maybe there exists an afterlife, where I could see *them* again… I could tell her that I'm sorry, and that I tried. I never got to ask him whether he was proud of me.

Ugh, Halcyon again. What does that guy want?? He's acting like a mole there with his nose in everyone's businesses. Idiots. All the best people die early. The idiots survive on, alive but not living.
trivia:
- He canonically speaks Cantonese. He's the only character who does, and other characters don't find anything off about it.
    - 他说且只会说粤语。反正大家也听得懂。
- He has a little "my goddamn leash of curses" which is a medicine box, the kind that has cells arranged in three rows (for breakfast, lunch, and dinner) and seven columns (from Monday to Sunday). You put the required amount of pills in each box at the start of every week and take the pills as scheduled. He hates it to the guts.
- During his visits to Ministry Affiliate, the students started spreading a rumor that he can breathe fire, shoot lasers from his eyes, and could open his mouth really wide. If he got mad at you, he would chop you up with laser eyes, cook you with fire breath, and eat you piece by piece. If he got *really* mad at you, he would swallow you raw while you're still alive.
note:
- You can change the uniform design, but
    - Keep it a dark color
    - Have the Bauhinian pink somewhere on it
    - Make sure they're wearing gloves
- Any interactions with Whiteout should be drawn in his young, yellow-haired design.
- Any interactions with Goose, Pumpkin, and Halcyon should be drawn in his old, bald design.

name: Gecko
quote: Uh... You don't look like Peacock.
about:
我嘞个绝世大冤种啊我的壁虎

Bauhinian smuggler. Had been caught once, but returned to the trade because she didn't know what else to do. Her worst mistake is not knowing that [Peacock](/characters/peacock/) has a [stepdaughter](/characters/sparky/) who is batshit crazy.
trivia: - If she had a lusus, it would be a gecko.

name: Lark
about: Trans guy. A Morelandian agent in Bauhinia, recruited to recover the nuke that the kids found.
trivia: - If he had a lusus, it would be a lark.

name: Pearl
desc: A little girl who cries pearls
about:
She cries pearls. Yes, her tears are literally pearls.

She is everything you would expect a little girl to be: cute, curious, instinctively kind, loves animals, and incredibly stupid.
trivia: - She has both a Bauhinian passport and a Sylvandian one, both totally legal (not forged).

name: Fern
about: Fantoni girl.

name: Jackpot
about: Yes, he is the guy who made all these contraception pills.

name: Snake
about:
[Jackpot](/character/jackpot/)'s mischevious and ambitious son.

Snake has a mutation that gives him a pair of bird wings.

He is *very* full of himself, but still likes being friends with other people a lot, so he is more pleasant to be around than his dad.

He still lives with his dad because he's too young, but he dreams of leaving him, starting his own business, and living in a big house all on his own.

He has a pet snake named Blizzard. It is — surprise — a Blizzard Cornsnake. He thinks snakes are cool, which is why he also named himself Snake.

name: Snowball
about: Snowball is a part of the [Appaloosa Tribe](/world/moreland/appaloosa-tribe/) in [Moreland](/world/moreland/). She is classified as an extrovert.

name: Buttercup
desc: Fleash rebel fighting for independence from Sylvandia.
about: Buttercup is a rebel. Her weapon of choice is a rifle stolen from a Moose soldier.
trivia: - She's probably the character with the longest color palette.

name: Beauty
about:
The oldest daughter in the Cherry-Hyrax family, always neck-deep in pop culture. Her desk is plastered with pictures of her favorite idols, and she would never miss a single concert, unless she got bad grades at school and Hyrax forbid her from going.

She has strabismus, where her right eye points outward. Her weapon of choice is a bladed fan.

Hyrax and Peacock arranged for her to marry [Ironheart](/characters/ironheart/).

name: Chastity
about: A wild, adventurous soul, always eager to get her hands dirty. She loved waving a rubber chainsaw around, though sometimes she swaps it for a real blade and you can't tell from afar. Despite her crazy demeanor, she is very reasonable and a good person to go to for advice.

name: Devotion
desc: The boss of everything in existence.
about:
Always parading around a poker face, it's hard to believe Devotion doesn't have a heart made of lead. If she has her sights on something, no one in the world could change her mind. This was why she enlisted in the army during the Fantoni war. Hyrax went through a lot of trouble ensuring she got out alive.

Her weapon of choice is a retired military Colt 1911.

name: Elegance
desc: For fuck's sake the only normal person in the family.
about: A lovely little girl who loves art and animals, especially her winghorse Muffin. Always the one to get kidnapped during incidents. Her weapon of choice is a lasso which she can only wield effectively when she's riding.

name: Animus
desc: Would be normal too if he weren't a boy which makes him oh-so-special.
about: The over-adored crown jewel of the family on account of him being the only boy. His weapon of choice is a pair of nun-chucks.

name: Hyrax
about: Hyrax is the chairman of Starcorp and the father of 5 children — four, actually.

name: Kismet

attr.Soul: Has 6, an original one and 5 superpowered ones, rainbow, all gas

about:
The ~~dictator~~ president of Bauhinia. Extremely powerful.

Kismet was born with nothing special, but he consumed 5 other souls with extremely strong superpowers and now he has all 5 [common powers](/world/superpowers/). He is after [Tundra](/characters/tundra/)'s immortal body. If magic weren't impossible to get ahold of, he would've went for that too.

His 6 souls made him into a rainbow and molded his text color into pure black.

He has his extremely powerful mind-reading tuned to the entire Flower City. Usually people would just be background noise, but he would be alerted if there are in-subservient thoughts.

He learnt about reincarnation through reading minds, and lied about being the reincarnation of [Hyrax](/characters/hyrax/) with memories intact. Because of this, he came up with the idea of [eternal death](/world/bauhinia/#eternal-death), to prevent people from reincarnating, let alone with memory.

After acquiring Tundra's body, he needed stand-ins for himself in public appearances, and thus [Project Kismet](/stories/project-kismet/) was initiated.
trivia:
- His rainbow border comes from too many souls leaking aura. This is purely a design aspect and in-universe characters can't see it.
- Song: [Babylon - Dirt Poor Robins](https://youtu.be/Vg5163AJkwk?si=pC0VAWhrRxBu1anD).

name: Pinecone
quote: Deep breath… I can do this.
about:
Pinecone used to just be a short little housewife at only 145cm, raising two kids, running a grocery store with her husband, suffering domestic abuse yet trying and failing to seek help. That is, until one day, she was approached by government agents giving her an offer she can't refuse.

Her kids would be guaranteed spots at Bauhinia's top institutions and offered comfortable and well-paid jobs, but Pinecone herself would also be working a secret job that forbids her from seeing her children in person again. She will be trained adequately in her new job. They have been watching her for quite a while and they know she can do it.

Pinecone had to agree. She was then taken to a plastic surgeon, hairdresser, and all that; and by the time she got out she looked no longer like herself, but rather like… the president of Bauhinia, Kismet. She even had a throat implant that changed her voice to his.

That was the job. She would stand in for him during public appearances. Otherwise, she had all the time to herself, though she could not leave the government building nor contact anyone outside, except for calling her kids each once a week, and she had to strictly not mention her job to them. Her younger child, Firecrackers, couldn't even be called at all because he's mute so even if she did call him, he couldn't say anything over the phone. She just left voice messages.

Pinecone is grateful. She is living in a fancy palace and has delicious and nutritious meals every day. Though, sometimes the fear of fucking up and causing an international scandal got too great and she was scared of facing the numerous cameras and journalists. But then, Rosemary will always be there to comfort her.

*This is the best job in the world; you're lucky. Other people wouldn't dream of getting it.*
trivia: - Song: [Spoken For - Flavor Foley](https://youtu.be/LvYL8u4p-aM?si=3VVQIKlAi_2sibra)
desczh:
松果原本只是一个小矮个子，杂货铺的老板娘，长期被家暴但一直求助失败。直到有一天，一些政府官员找上了她家门，给她开出了个她无法拒绝的邀请。

他们保证松果的小孩能有良好的教育和稳定的工作，但是松果本人要参与一个绝密的政府项目，这辈子都不会再见到她的朋友家人。他们观察了松果很久，她一定能胜任。

松果不得不同意。她被带去整容、理发，等等，直到她都认不出自己的脸。这个脸倒是挺像天意总统啊？她甚至喉咙里被安装了一个变声器，连声音都听着像天意的。

这就是工作内容。她会代替天意在公共场合露面。不露面时就在训练下次露面。除此之外的时间都能自由分配，但她不能离开那栋楼，也不能联系外界，除了每周能和自己小孩打一次电话。她的儿子爆竹甚至没法用电话沟通，只能和女儿海啸联系。

松果很感激。她住在一个大宫殿里，每天都有吃不完的食物，当她有担忧时迷迭香总会安慰她。

*这是世界上最棒的工作了，别人都求之不得，你很幸运。*

name: Rosemary
about: Rosemary is assigned Pinecone's handler in Project Kismet. She is gentle and caring, and helped Pinecone get through her worst times. She also has a couple college-aged kids.

name: Sundae
about: Sundae is nice.

name: Dragonfly
about: Dragonfly is a security guard for Starcorp. He trained Sparky in bodyguarding, and would often guard Animus with her.
trivia: - If he had a lusus, it would be a dragonfly.

name: Robin
about: Took over as lead scientist of Project Boomerang after the disappearance of Koala and Kangaroo.
trivia: - If he had a lusus, it would be a robin.

name: Frosting
about:
Frosting grew up in the Project Boomerang laboratory with her parents.

She grew up to be a government archivist, tasked with erasing records of disappeared people in addition to whatever archivists usually do. She also manages the soul vault.

She let Jerboa into the archives to read about Project Boomerang and his parents.
desczh:
糖霜从小跟自己爸爸旅鸫在回旋镖计划的实验基地里长大。跃鼠是她的好朋友。

她长大后当上了政府档案管理员，给跳鼠查看了回旋镖计划的真相。

她也负责管理天意的灵魂库。

name: Candlelight
trivia: - 回族。

name: Sundew
about:
Sundew was the daughter of Muscat and Ember. She hated her dad and made it her life's mission to help her mom escape, but she failed.

She studied hard and got into a university in [People's Vanguard](/world/westavia/peoples-vanguard/), though Ember forbid her from going. She counted up her life's savings, borrowed a lot from [Thyme](/characters/thyme/), and stole a little bit of Ember's, and hopped on a midnight train from Area 29 to People's Vanguard. She never looked back.

Now, she owns a little mama and papa's restaurant with her husband in People's Vanguard. Life was hard but relatively peaceful. She missed her little brother and wondered how he was doing, and will he ever come looking for her.
trivia: - 回族。

name: Sunflower
about:
Sunflower is a high school student put on "suicide watch" by the [SPF](/world/westavia/spf/) because she had a paracosm called [Tadlet Kingdom](/world/tadlet-kingdom/). She liked knitting, and her weapon of choice is a pair of knitting needles.

She later died in the outside world but continued to live on spiritually in her paracosm.

name: Starry
about: Starry was a student at Area 1 Middle School when one day she suddenly disappeared, sucked into [Sunflower](/characters/sunflower/)'s paracosm.

name: Icicle
about: When her friend [Starry](/characters/starry/) disappeared, she decided to find her, thus entering [Sunflower](/characters/sunflower/)'s paracosm.

name: Helsinki
about: Helsinki is a distant relative of [Pumpkin](/characters/pumpkin/)'s, descended from the part of his family that didn't immigrate to [Bauhinia](/world/bauhinia/). She is the party secratary in [the village](/world/westavia/nameless-village/).
trivia: - 维吾尔族。

name: Mooncake
about: A police officer in a [little village](/world/westavia/nameless-village/).
trivia: - 东乡族。

name: Thyme
desc: Leader of a tiny nameless village on the outskirts of Area 29
about: The well-revered leader of the nameless village, who once attempted to save it from terrorists. His right leg is crippled from that incident. He is the only one who knows the real name of the village, having been informed of it by the previous leader, though he dares not utter it in front of others.
trivia: - 东乡族。

name: Natasha
about:
Natasha is loud. You'll hear her before you see her. And after you see her, you'll probably feel her. Or feel whatever thing she managed to throw at you.

She seems addicted to attention. She couldn't handle not being in the spotlight. She probably doesn't realize she's not the only person in the world. But she does; she knows that all too clearly. She's like this for a reason. She barely sees her parents, as they're both working in the city. Her grandparents weren't the most fun people in the world by young people standards, and she didn't have any siblings. She was lonely, and she craved attention.
trivia: - 俄罗斯族。

name: Moonflower
desc: A dancer, but also an informer.
about:
ئايگۈل, Uyghurche for Moonflower. Literally just ئاي (moon) + گۈل (flower).

The lead dancer of a traveling dance troupe. Also works as an informer for the WIS.
trivia: - 维吾尔族

name: Cobalt
about:
Cobalt was a normal college student who barely passed classes and liked playing with her friends. But one day, her friend Kaleidoscope confessed to her, and disappeared right after. The rest of the crew set out to find her.

Cobalt also learned classic Sylvandian soul-extraction from Moonbeam.

name: Kaleidoscope
about: Kaleidoscope greatly cares for her friends and family, to the point where she even went into the mafia to pay back her father's debt. Ironically, the kidnapping scene she faked in the hopes that his friends would give up on him thinking she's dead actually led them into the underground as well to look for her.

name: Nightingale
about: She

name: Skyhawk
about: He

name: Moonbeam
about: Moonbeam is a Sylvandian psychic well-trained in soul-extraction. She sometimes tours around the continent picking lucky students.

name: Melody
trivia: - His bio is a code.

name: Tundra
about:
Tundra found out early on in his life that he was immortal. Because of this, he didn't take care of his body at *all*; not even lending worry to his fatal thing. He spent his days drinking and smoking weed in corners the law can't see.

None of this prepared him for when the [dictator of Bauhinia](/characters/kismet/) himself went after him.
trivia: - If he had a lusus, it would be a sloth.

name: Vampire
desc: Has spent more time as a dragon than as a human.
about: Vampire was one of the few people to jump over the dragon gate, situated in Atlasia, before Bauhinian magicians ~~stole~~ borrowed it. He was 13 when he turned into a dragon this way. He somehow unknowingly made it to Coastline through a system of underwater rivers, and have been depleting the fish of [Honeypot Lake](/world/bauhinia/honeypot-lake/) for 15 years before he was found.

name: Jackalope

attr.Nickname: Jack; Alpha (code name by the MSS)
attr.Soul: Solid, a tangle of barbed wire

about:
Jackalope is an officer at the Intelligence Corps of the Guardian Moose. She is classified as an extrovert.

In her free time, she loved gardening.

name: Whiteout
about: Whiteout is a stern MSS officer, but she was always nice to her apprentice Paperweight. When she was revealed to be one of the deepest and most dangerous moles, she made a run for the border and the higher-ups ordered Paperweight to hunt her down.
note:
- You can change the uniform design, but
    - Keep it a dark color
    - Have the Bauhinian pink somewhere on it
    - Make sure they're wearing gloves

name: Entity

attr.Soul: Solid, soft and squishy like a marshmallow

about:
Entity is an executioner.

Not really though. He's a soul-extractor.

He takes the souls of those sentenced to eternal death — not even allowed to reincarnate. He extracts them, locks them up in a jar, and sends the freshly-drained body to cremation. It's also the reason why he met Frosting, the archivist who handles the soul jars.

At work, he pulls up a stoic and serious face to hide his emotions. To his friends and family, though, he's a scaredy-cat. He screams at the tiniest of bugs and have to have Frosting deal with them. He jumps at the slightest sound.

He believes whole-heartedly that the government has a chip in his brain to monitor his thoughts.

---

People will tell you that bodies without souls are just corpses. I know it's false. They are very much alive. They can live on for around a week. And guess what? For the first few days, the soul — if it had not found a new body — can still feel the old body. I found out during my soul-extraction training, when my friend and I pulled each other's soul out in turn for fun. Which means, the condemned can feel their body being burned to ashes.

I try to live with the knowledge. That they will suffer the fire, that *I* enabled it, and that most of the time, their crimes aren't serious enough to warrant permanent death where even reincarnation, birthing as an *entirely new* soul, is not allowed. *Nothing* warrants that—

Stop thinking! *Stop thinking*, you stupid brain! Don't think — no, not the chip, don't think about it — Of course the government has their reasons! Some people *are* evil enough that there's no place in the world for them. Who am I to disagree? Right. Just do your job. Stop thinking about that. Think about your wife and daughter.

I take a deep breath, and I stop thinking.
trivia:
- Song: [Little Pistols by Mother Mother](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=H6f9Wc1yFsQ)
- Has therapy every Tuesday. It's very important for him to keep functioning.
- Frosting, Harmony, and hotpot are some of the few things that can make him smile.
- In winter, obsessively touches every metal thing like door handles with a key before touching it with his hand.

name: Harmony

attr.Soul: Gas, shaped like a music note

about: Harmony attends the [MSS](/world/bauhinia/mss/)'s spy school in Flower City.

name: Sugarcane
about: Sugarcane was admitted to Spy School and later joined the MSS as the first place in the graduating class.

name: Rose
about:
Rose went to the same elementary school as Harmony and Sugarcane.

She had always been the popular kid at school, but the only two kids she wasn't able to "conquer" were Sugarcane and Harmony, whom she despises and tells everyone else to isolate. And now that they've went to some fancy cool "spy school," she's bound to cause them more trouble.
trivia:
- 壮族。
- She can't wait to get to college so she can have her ears pierced and hair dyed.
desczh: 玫瑰和甘蔗还有和谐声是小学同学。她在学校一直很受欢迎，除了甘蔗和和谐声之外的人都喜欢她。所以她就带头孤立她们俩。现在，她俩去上了这个花里胡哨的“间谍学校”，玫瑰肯定要继续找她们麻烦。

name: Cosmo
quote: If everyone believes it, then it is the truth.

attr.Soul: Has two: one pink (gas, heart-shaped), the other blue (liquid, slimy)

about:
Cosmo was born with two souls, a rare occurance because of shenanigans with two eggs but no twins.

Cosmo has the mind reading superpower thanks to her third eye, but it's so weak that she can only tell whether somebody is lying intentionally — though she's quite good at that. She can't tell if someone is lying by omission, or tell facts from lies (so if someone genuinely believes in what they're saying, she will think they're telling the truth), but if you're lying and she heard you, she will know.

When she lies herself, her third eye closes. Otherwise, it stays open, even when she's sleeping. (It closes when she washes her face too though, or it's gonna be awkward.)
note:
- Left eye blue, right eye pink. Left eyebrow pink, right eyebrow blue. Eyelashes match the eyes.
- Sleeves are wider than a normal sleeve.
- Both the inside of her ears and her dress are gradient from pink (top) to blue (bottom).
- Shoes and hairband match color.
- The yellow eye (yellow with black pupil) is always open, unless she's lying.

name: Jewel
quote: Why would the hunter be scared of bullets, when she's the one holding the gun?
about: Vice-president (and later president) of the Investigative Investigators, with a penchant for baseless conspiracy, but also relentless curiosity and desire to find the truth, which I'm sure won't cause her any problems!
trivia: - 白族。

name: Jelly
about:
Jelly is in Bauhinia because of her father's work, while her mother remained back in Westavia. She didn't have friends at school, and was very lonely.

Until one day, two lovely girls came up to her and asked to play with her.

They became BFFs.

name: Checkers
about: Checkers is the (former) cultural attaché of the Westavian Embassy in Flower City. He was then blown and deported.

name: Jasmine
desc: Poet, writer, and a free soul.
about: A poet from Bauhinia, traveled to Moreland and wandered with the [Appaloosa Tribe](/world/moreland/appaloosa-tribe/) for a long while before being kidnapped back into Bauhinia and sentenced to eternal death. She never received an energy classification.

name: Jinx
about:
Jinx's mother died giving birth. Her father named her "Jinx" because of this. She is classified as an introvert.

Jinx made the most atheist of Moose question their beliefs — wherever she went, trouble followed.

After graduating high school, she git drafted into the cavalry for her love of horses, both normal ones and [winghorses](/world/creatures/). After completing her service, she continued to work as a horse trainer and riding instructor.
trivia: - 蒙古族。

name: Typhoon

attr.Soul: Solid, ice cube that looks like chocolate because it's brown

about:
Typhoon used to live on the Fantoni Plateau. But when her parents wanted to force her into an arranged marriage with a boy she hated, she packed a bit of food and water and ran away from home. She went all the way from Fanton to Moreland, all by herself, only hitching maybe a couple rides or three along the way.

A little inside Moreland's borders, she got attacked by a bear and one leg was gravely injured, and started to infect without treatment. That was when the Guardian Moose found her. They sent her to a hospital and had her bad leg amputated, and thus her life was spared. The Guardians then offered to recruit her as their wilderness survival instructor, to which she agreed. She was given Moose nationality and classified as an extrovert.

She was soon hailed as a devil by the new recruits for her strictness and the intensity of her training. Years later, they also got her a prosthetic leg, which made the newbies even more scared because now she can kick them properly. Jinx remembers her torment and thanked the stars that Typhoon didn't have the robot leg while she was in the army.
trivia: - 藏族。

name: Tsunami
desc: Some random hotel concierge with a lot of aura about.
about:
Tsunami lost her mother at age 9 and to this day she is still convinced that she went to jail. She hated her father and loved her little brother. She got a job in a hotel.

When Crackers got back from the battle field in a box, she was heartbroken. But she was more surprised when Crackers's friend from middle school, Sky, approached her to inform her of the cause of his death — magic. And an offer to help him investigate.

This is how Tsunami started her mission in Fanton, trying to find the source of the Fantoni's magic.

name: Jumbo
about:
Jumbo was just a small trader living near the Fantoni border, trading stuff between Bauhinia and Fanton, mostly staying within the bounds of the law.

She loved making OCs. She created characters inside the real world, and took pride in the detailed research she does in the real world that made her OCs more realistic.

When the war broke out, trade between the two nations were nearly all cut off, and Jumbo found herself without any source of income. But the connections she established with Fantoni traders weren't going anywhere. She tried to offer to work for the MSS, but got rejected. And then she suddenly got a tiny bit of actual Bauhinian intel (details TBD), so she tried her luck again with the Fantoni, using that intel as a buy-in. They recruited her.

Jumbo then realized that she had no way of actually gathering useful intel, so she simply made shit up. When inconsistencies were found out by the National Security Agency of Fanton, she made up fake contacts based on her OCs to shift the blame to.

Slowly, due to shit tradecraft, her messages to the Fanton military got intercepted by the MSS. They had a good laugh about how stupid this was, and realized that the Fantoni Secret Service trusted Jumbo a lot. Here comes the chance. Sky went to Jumbo and gave her a choice. She can either go to jail for treason, or she can start working for the MSS, giving the Fantoni Secret Service some specific fake intel provided to her. The choice was obvious. Jumbo finally got to work for the MSS now.

After the war was over, Jumbo was too burnt out to ever consider making OCs again. She moved to northeastern Bauhinia to do trade with Atlasia.

name: Mulberry
about:
Mulberry was a rebellious young college drop-out who longed for the illicit substances banned by her home country. When she was not working at the grocery store, she spent her time on the streets, finding places to buy smokes and drinks.

When the war broke out, she was drafted by the army, but offered to spy on Bauhinia for the Secret Service to avoid actually getting on the battlefield. Nearly as soon as she landed inside the country she turned herself in to the MSS. Sky got her to send fake intel to the Secret Service. She stayed in Bauhinia after the war, still working minimum-wage jobs, but getting a pension from the MSS and getting high a lot more safely. (Safe as in the law won't get her; it's still very unhealthy. Don't do drugs.)

name: Blackjack
about:
Blackjack was a Fantoni underground mobster before the war, running her own team of gangsters. She also had some "friends" in the government who would cover for her in exchange for bribes.

Despite maintaining a cold and ruthless appearance as a mob boss, she longed for a life of stability where she could be live under the light.

Her business should've been booming because of the war, but one of her government pals asked her for a bigger protection fee — run a little sabotage job in Bauhinia.

She was given a little pen, which the government official told her was a magic spell. She was supposed to cast it by tapping its butt in a certain rhythm near an important fiber-optic line in Bauhinia.

Blackjack landed in Bauhinia, only to be soon caught by the MSS. Sky came in and gave her an offer: work for the MSS, and we will provide you with a proper, well-paying job in Bauhinia.

Blackjack accepted the offer. She was sent back to Fanton with fake news about the cable being destroyed, and a new mission to find out the source of the magic. But she got caught and imprisoned.

Right as the war was ending, Sky came to Fanton personally to blackmail the military official who imprisoned her. She was released back into Bauhinia.

After the war, she got her promised job as a martial arts instructor at a high school. She found herself longing for adventure once more, being bored out by the rigid predictiveness of life in the light.
trivia: - 你可以管她叫“二十一”，但不能叫“21”。

name: Holly

attr.Soul: Gas (both two), her own is green, leaf-shaped; her sister's is red, fruit-shaped

about:
Holly had an older sister, but one day she fell sick from terminal illness. Not wanting to lose her forever, Holly's parents transplanted her sister's soul into Holly, leaving her body to die alone. It was illegal, so they told Holly to tell everyone she has ~~homophobia~~ heterochromia.

The merge went well but Holly never really accepted the fact that her late sister was a part of her now. Holly's own green soul remained dominant, though her newfound hyperawareness power came from her sister.

Holly wanted to be a TV star. The first show she went on was The Bodyguard Show as a principal, and she worked with Sparky.
note:
- Eye and eyebrows: left red, right green.
- Eyelashes and ears: left green, right red.

name: Cornflower
about:
Cornflower is a wiretapper for the MSS, spending all day sitting in her desk transcribing the various bugs installed all over Flower City.

She often leaves out incriminating information in her reports, protecting the people she's eavesdropping on. She was so good at making herself look like she's good at her job that no one noticed.
trivia:
- She is a direct ripoff of Bkornblume from [Reverse: 1999](https://re1999.bluepoch.com/), because I love her and no one can stop me. Cornflower's soul color is colorpicked from Bkorn's scarf.
- Her long hair technically violates MSS dress code, as they require hair to either be short or tied up, but everyone thinks she's so good at her job that they let her keep her long hair untied.
- Her actual hearing is impacted by covering her ears with headphones blasting noises all the time, so she often uses her hyperawareness powers to aid her hearing.

name: Starlight
desc: Head researcher at the Center for Research on Souls.
about:
A grouchy psychologist researching on how to read souls from the outset in Flower City's Center for Research on Souls (CRS).

She had always been distant from her mother and wanted to connect, but hadn't had a chance before her mother was dying of cancer. Starlight illegally extracted her soul — in the shape of a solid rock — before she died. Starlight tried consuming it, but every single time, her body had rejected her mother's soul and she spit the chunk of rock out. She had kept it ever since, desperate to find a way to read it. The research she's doing right now thus became important to her not only professionally, but also personally.

name: Sparrow
about:
After people at the CRS found out that souls could be serialized into data, Sparrow was hired as a computer science specialist to work on the project alongside Starlight.

They're quite carefree in their demeanors, boldened by their family's connections in the government, and treat every day like "any work for me to do? No? Well, time to go play!" But when they find an interesting lead worth pursuing, they *will* work day and night until they're satisfied.

At first, they don't even believe in the concept of souls, thinking that someone is playing a deliberate prank on them. But later they came to accept that souls are actually a thing that exists.
trivia:
- They belong to a group of people perhaps even rarer than immortals: people whose favorite color isn't their soul color. Perhaps this has something to do with them not believing in souls.
    - They still like yellow (it's like, genetically impossible to hate your soul color); they just like pink *more*.
